conditions.label: Bone Health/Osteoporosis
beneficial: low fat or fat free dairy

conditions.label: Chronic Kidney Disease
limit: and potassium (dark colas, bran cereals, nuts, beans, dairy)
limit_raw: and potassium if advised (dark colas, bran cereals, nuts, beans, dairy)

conditions.label: Kidney Failure
limit: foods high in potassium and phosphorus
large fluid loads if fluid restricted
limit_raw: foods high in potassium and phosphorus
limit_unmapped: large fluid loads if fluid restricted
avoid: over the counter supplements not recommended by your kidney team
avoid_raw: over-the-counter supplements not recommended by your kidney team
avoid_unmapped: over the counter supplements not recommended by your kidney team

conditions.label: Kidney Stones
limit: oxalate rich foods (spinach, nuts, chocolate, beets)
limit_raw: oxalate-rich foods if advised (spinach, nuts, chocolate, beets)
avoid: organ meats and excess shellfish meat for uric acid stones
avoid_raw: organ meats and excess shellfish/meat for uric-acid stones

conditions.label: Celiac Disease
beneficial: gluten free whole grains (rice, quinoa, buckwheat)
limit: saturated fat heavy gluten free products
limit_unmapped: saturated fat heavy gluten free products

conditions.label: Irritable Bowel Syndrome
avoid: sorbitol sweetened products and personal trigger foods
avoid_raw: sorbitol-sweetened products and personal trigger foods
avoid_unmapped: sorbitol sweetened products and personal trigger foods

conditions.label: Crohn's Disease
avoid: alcohol and personal trigger foods that worsen diarrhea or pain
avoid_raw: alcohol and personal trigger foods that worsen diarrhea or pain

conditions.label: Ulcerative Colitis
avoid: alcohol and foods that clearly worsen symptoms
avoid_raw: alcohol and foods that clearly worsen symptoms

conditions.label: Diverticular Disease
avoid: processed meats and chronically low fiber eating patterns
avoid_raw: processed meats and chronically low-fiber eating patterns

conditions.label: Gallstones
beneficial: healthy fats like olive oil and fish
beneficial_raw: healthy fats like olive oil and fish

conditions.label: Lactose Intolerance
avoid_raw: and other lactose-heavy dairy if symptomatic

conditions.label: Constipation
avoid: chronic reliance on ultra processed low fiber foods
avoid_raw: chronic reliance on ultra-processed low-fiber foods

conditions.label: Gastroparesis
avoid: tough fibrous foods such as broccoli stalks
avoid_raw: tough fibrous foods such as broccoli stalks
avoid_unmapped: tough fibrous foods such as broccoli stalks

conditions.label: Functional Dyspepsia
limit: wheat or grains if they trigger symptoms
limit_raw: wheat or grains if they trigger symptoms
avoid: carbonated drinks and personal trigger foods
avoid_raw: carbonated drinks and personal trigger foods

conditions.label: Hypertriglyceridemia
avoid: desserts made with high fructose corn syrup
avoid_raw: desserts made with high-fructose corn syrup

conditions.label: Rheumatoid Arthritis
avoid: trans fats and heavily processed snack foods
avoid_raw: trans fats and heavily processed snack foods

conditions.label: Osteoarthritis
avoid: trans fats and heavily processed foods that promote inflammation
avoid_raw: trans fats and heavily processed foods that promote inflammation

conditions.label: Asthma
avoid: known food allergens if they trigger symptoms or anaphylaxis
avoid_raw: known food allergens if they trigger symptoms or anaphylaxis
avoid_unmapped: known food allergens if they trigger symptoms or anaphylaxis

conditions.label: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
avoid: highly processed salty foods and sugary drinks if they displace nutrient dense foods
avoid_raw: highly processed salty foods and sugary drinks if they displace nutrient-dense foods

conditions.label: Parkinson's Disease
limit: high fat meals and large protein loads close to levodopa if they impair medication response
limit_raw: high-fat meals and large protein loads close to levodopa if they impair medication response
limit_unmapped: high fat meals and large protein loads close to levodopa if they impair medication response
avoid: protein heavy meals timed with levodopa if they consistently reduce medication effect
avoid_raw: protein-heavy meals timed with levodopa if they consistently reduce medication effect
avoid_unmapped: protein heavy meals timed with levodopa if they consistently reduce medication effect

conditions.label: Multiple Sclerosis
avoid: trans fats and chronically poor quality western style diets
avoid_raw: trans fats and chronically poor-quality western-style diets

conditions.label: Age-Related Macular Degeneration
avoid: diets dominated by processed foods and excess linoleic acid rich junk food
avoid_raw: diets dominated by processed foods and excess linoleic-acid-rich junk food

conditions.label: Glaucoma
avoid: highly processed foods that worsen cardiovascular risk factors
avoid_raw: highly processed foods that worsen cardiovascular risk factors

conditions.label: Cataracts
beneficial: foods rich in vitamins c and e
beneficial_raw: foods rich in vitamins c and e
avoid: chronically poor produce intake and smoking linked unhealthy diet patterns
avoid_raw: chronically poor produce intake and smoking-linked unhealthy diet patterns
avoid_unmapped: chronically poor produce intake and smoking linked unhealthy diet patterns

conditions.label: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome
avoid: sugary drinks and desserts that sharply raise insulin
avoid_raw: sugary drinks and desserts that sharply raise insulin

conditions.label: Iron-Deficiency Anemia
limit: tea or coffee with iron rich meals
limit_raw: tea or coffee with iron-rich meals if they reduce iron absorption
avoid: chronic intake patterns that displace iron rich foods
avoid_raw: chronic intake patterns that displace iron-rich foods
avoid_unmapped: chronic intake patterns that displace iron rich foods

conditions.label: Vitamin B12 Deficiency Anemia
limit: very low b12 eating patterns without replacement or supplementation
limit_raw: very low-b12 eating patterns without replacement or supplementation
limit_unmapped: very low b12 eating patterns without replacement or supplementation
avoid: self restrictive diets that eliminate b12 sources
avoid_raw: self-restrictive diets that eliminate b12 sources
avoid_unmapped: self restrictive diets that eliminate b12 sources

conditions.label: Cystic Fibrosis
avoid: chronic under eating that fails to meet calorie or protein needs
avoid_raw: chronic under-eating that fails to meet calorie or protein needs
avoid_unmapped: chronic under eating that fails to meet calorie or protein needs

conditions.label: HIV/AIDS
limit: highly processed foods if they displace nutrient dense foods
limit_raw: highly processed foods if they displace nutrient-dense foods
avoid: unsafe foods or poor food safety practices that increase infection risk
avoid_raw: unsafe foods or poor food safety practices that increase infection risk
avoid_unmapped: unsafe foods or poor food safety practices that increase infection risk

conditions.label: Phenylketonuria
limit_raw: meat depending on individualized phenylalanine allowance
avoid: regular high protein foods such as meat
avoid_raw: regular high-protein foods such as meat
avoid_unmapped: regular high protein foods such as meat

conditions.label: Galactosemia
beneficial: soy formula or other lactose free formula
beneficial_raw: soy formula or other lactose-free formula

conditions.label: Sickle Cell Disease
avoid: dehydration and vitamins with extra iron unless the care team recommends them
avoid_raw: dehydration and vitamins with extra iron unless the care team recommends them
avoid_unmapped: dehydration and vitamins with extra iron unless the care team recommends them
